nodes.name: Three-banded warbler
nodes.summary: Three-banded warbler（Basileuterus trifasciatus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Three-banded warbler。

nodes.name: Three-banded warbler
nodes.summary: The three-banded warbler (Basileuterus trifasciatus) is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It is found in Ecuador and Peru. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and heavily degraded former forest. References External links Three-banded warbler photos on antpitta.com
nodes.shortSummary: The three-banded warbler (Basileuterus trifasciatus) is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It is found in Ecuador and Peru.

nodes.name: Basileuterus
nodes.summary: Basileuterus（Basileuterus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联11种鸟类，如Fan-tailed warbler、Rufous-capped warbler、Black-cheeked warbler等11种鸟类。
